title: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
